name: Target
description: Target schema from Amazon EventBridge API

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the target.

RoleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the IAM role.

Input.description: Valid JSON text passed to the target.

InputPath.description: JSONPath to extract from the event and send to the target.

InputTransformer.description: Settings to transform input before sending to the target.
